name: Lex Newline After Plus Operator
description: {a +\nb} — newline immediately after '+' separates statements. UNCERTAIN: parse_binary doesn't skip newlines before parsing the right operand, so 'a +' should probably continue to 'b' but the current parser may abort. WILL_FAIL_UNTIL_FIX: parse_binary should skip newlines after the operator token. Semantic intent: Operator(Add,a,b).
